title: Workloads — Workload placement
text:
While standard workload resources (like Deployments and Jobs) manage the lifecycle of Pods,
you may have complex scheduling requirements where groups of Pods must be treated as a single unit.
The
Workload API
allows you to define
PodGroupTemplates
to group Pods and apply advanced scheduling policies to them,
such as
gang scheduling
.
Controllers create
PodGroup
objects from these templates at runtime,
and
Pods
reference their
PodGroup
via the
spec.schedulingGroup
field. This is particularly useful for batch processing and machine
learning workloads where "all-or-nothing" placement is required.
